channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Court Petition Filed Against Francis Atwoli's Recent COTU Re-election
item.description: Francis Atwoli, the long-serving Secretary General of the Central Organization of Trade Unions (COTU) in Kenya, faces a legal challenge over his latest re-election. A court petition has been lodged co...

item.title: Former NPA Members Confirm Central Mindanao Units Are Inactive
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — Two former members of the New People’s Army (NPA), skilled in making improvised explosive devices, officially surrendered to the government in General Santos City on March...

item.title: Role of Local Intermediaries in Providing Legal Identity in Sierra Leone
item.description: For many people for Africa, including Sierra Leone, lack of official identity fit block dem from accessing basic rights like school, healthcare, and protection. Around 542 million Africans no get iden...

item.title: Adam Hillman Transforms Everyday Objects into Intricate Visual Patterns
item.description: Adam Hillman is an artist with a remarkable talent for transforming ordinary items into visually captivating patterns. Using objects like paperclips, fruit slices, cereal, coins, and candy, Hillman ca...

item.title: ADC Clarifies Court Ruling Does Not Affect Current Leadership
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has clarified that the recent Court of Appeal ruling in their internal leadership dispute is purely procedural and does not affect the legitimacy or tenure of the...

item.title: Union Ayush Ministry launches Yoga 365 to promote daily yoga practice across India
item.description: The Union Ministry of Ayush has launched 'Yoga 365', a nationwide campaign aimed at encouraging citizens to practise yoga every day rather than limiting it to the International Day of Yoga. Unveiled d...

item.title: Ndume Urges Tinubu to Focus on Security After Deadly Maiduguri Explosions
item.description: The Senator representing Borno South, Ali Ndume, don advise President Bola Tinubu make e put security first instead of dey think 2027 elections. Dis na after some explosions hit Maiduguri for Monday w...

item.title: Laura Henshaw lists renovated Brighton home for private sale at $9.1 million
item.description: Laura Henshaw, co-founder of fitness and wellness app KIC, and her husband Dalton Henshaw have listed their renovated Brighton property for private sale, with a price guide between $8.5 million and $9...

item.title: China announces emergency humanitarian aid for Iran, Lebanon, Jordan, and Iraq amid regional conflict
item.description: China has announced that it will extend emergency humanitarian assistance to several Middle Eastern countries, including Iran, Lebanon, Jordan, and Iraq, all of which are suffering due to an ongoing c...

item.title: Retired Security Chief Dr Kipilimba Praises Late President Magufuli's Dedication at Five-Year Memorial
item.description: Retired Director General of the National Security Department, Dr Modestus Kipilimba, has eulogised the late President Dr John Pombe Magufuli as a tireless leader who worked day and night during the fi...

item.title: Israel kills two senior Iranian officials amid regional tensions, US counterterror chief resigns
item.description: Israel has confirmed the killing of two senior Iranian officials, escalating tensions in the Middle East. The incident comes amid ongoing conflict involving Iran, and has prompted a high-profile resig...

item.title: AI is being exploited to create fraudulent job applicants and internal threats
item.description: Canadian security officials are warning that artificial intelligence is being used at unprecedented levels to commit fraud against both individuals and corporations. André Boucher, CTO at National Ban...

item.title: US intelligence official resigns over disagreement with Iran war strategy
item.description: Joseph Kent, Director of the US National Counterterrorism Center, resigned on Tuesday, citing his opposition to the ongoing war against Iran launched jointly by the United States and Israel. In his re...

item.title: 74-year-old woman presents live chicken to Soludo in appreciation at inauguration
item.description: On Tuesday, March 17, 2026, Madam Grace Okafor, a 74-year-old woman from Abatete in Idemili North, made a memorable gesture at Governor Chukwuma Soludo's second-term inauguration in Awka. The ceremony...

item.title: Sonam Wangchuk calls for constructive dialogue with Centre after NSA detention ends
item.description: Ladakh activist Sonam Wangchuk, after being released from detention under the National Security Act (NSA) on March 4, has called for a constructive and mutually beneficial dialogue with the Central Go...

item.title: Kenya May Face Fertilizer Supply Challenges Due to Strait of Hormuz Disruption
item.description: Kenya is facing potential fertilizer shortages following disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz caused by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, warns the United Nations Conference on Trade and Develop...

item.title: Borno Government Allocates ₦7.7 Billion for Rehabilitation of Repentant Boko Haram Members Amid Ongoing Attacks
item.description: According to recent findings from Borno State’s budget documents, the government has spent around ₦7.7 billion within 21 months to rehabilitate and reintegrate so-called repentant Boko Haram members u...

item.title: Nvidia announces development of orbital AI data centres for space applications
item.description: Nvidia has revealed plans to build artificial intelligence data centres in space, aiming to bring AI processing closer to where satellite data is generated. The initiative, centred around the new Spac...

item.title: Tourism in Madagascar Protects Some Forests While Causing Deforestation in Buffer Zones, Study Finds
item.description: Madagascar, one of the world's biodiversity hotspots, is famous for its lemurs and baobab trees but remains very poor, with around 80% of its population living on less than US$2.15 a day. Tourism has ...

item.title: Study Explores Potential Survival Benefits of GLP-1 Drugs in Cancer Patients with Brain Metastases and Diabetes
item.description: Recent research has investigated whether GLP-1 receptor agonists, such as Ozempic and Wegovy—commonly known for their weight-loss benefits—might also improve survival in patients whose cancer has spre...
